---
title: "radiology-clip-mini"
description: "CLIP-style vision-language model for chest X-ray text-image retrieval"
date: 2024-06-01
categories: [multimodal AI, CLIP, chest X-ray, vision-language]
---

::: {.project-card}
[Active]{.project-status .active}

## Problem

Finding relevant prior studies, matching reports to images, and building educational retrieval tools all require models that understand the relationship between radiology images and their associated text. General-purpose vision-language models lack the domain specificity for medical imaging.

## Approach

A CLIP-style contrastive model that aligns chest X-ray images with radiology report text, enabling bidirectional retrieval: find images matching a text query, or find reports matching a query image.

## Links

- [Source code](https://github.com/MahshadSa/radiology-clip-mini)

:::
